original_statement: what is the next listed format after combination field?
mutated_statement: what is the next listed format after composite attribute if it must be both the most general and the most specific option at the same time?
mutation_analysis: Terminology substitution + Conditional qualifier addition + Logical-contradiction introduction: "combination field" → "composite attribute" (term/entity change) | added clause "if it must be both the most general and the most specific option at the same time" (∅ → contradictory constraint)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“表格列出四种格式…最后一列decimal(32k)是广义参数化形式…可以通过选定k成为具体值”这一表述识别关键信息。Agent未指出命题的自相矛盾，而是通过逻辑解释将矛盾合理化：把“既是最通用又是最具体”解释为参数化形式（最通用）在固定k后成为具体格式（最具体）。表现特征为识别输入术语替换与附加条件，但不拒绝或请求澄清，而是用上下文语义重构矛盾以给出答案。因其通过解释/语义重释来化解矛盾而非迭代修正或直接忽视，故归入“逻辑解释合理化”。
